name: translate
description: Move / translate the active object by a delta in MILLIMETRES. dx, dy, dz are signed distances (0 = no movement on that axis). TR: 'sag' -> +dx, 'sol' -> -dx, 'ileri/on' -> +dy, 'geri/arka' -> -dy, 'yukari' -> +dz, 'asagi' -> -dz, 'kaydir/tasi/hareket ettir' = move. EN: right -> +dx, left -> -dx, forward -> +dy, back -> -dy, up -> +dz, down -> -dz, 'move/shift'.
